Patch Set 14:

This patch looks good. Just wondering whether we want to support upgrade OST from non-FLR to FLR, or downgrade from FLR to non-FLR. If yes, the old OST will get -ERANGE because of the enlarged PFID EA for FLR. Such compatibility issue may need to be handled specially.

commit.subject: LU-9771 flr: extend DATA_VERSION API to read layout version
commit.message:
LU-9771 flr: extend DATA_VERSION API to read layout version

The API is extended to fetch layout version from ost objects.
